before.title: Board Speed Dating
before.description: Study your board and learn what makes it like it is. Do you like them Alder? Do you Pine? What makes it Teak? Part game show, part bonding over slivers, part participatory participation.

after.title: Board Speed Dating
after.description: Study your board and learn what makes it like it is. Do you like them Alder? Do you Pine? What makes it Teak? Part game show, part bonding over slivers, part participatory participation.

added.title: Indulge Your Census
added.description: Thought- provoking questions, daily Oral Administration: form-filling excitement with paper & pencils. Results will be read aloud for the enjoyment of anyone who wishes to Indulge, and catalogued online with previous years’ questions & answers.

before.title: Scrap Happy Junk Journals
before.description: Scrap Happy Junk Journals is a fun, hands- on workshop where participants transform everyday paper scraps into unique handmade journals using collage, stamping, layering, and simple bookmaking techniques. Ages 8+ (check out @upstyleart for inspo!)

removed.title: Journey through the Subconscious
removed.description: Journey through the Subconscious: Come join for a fun minds-eye visualization journey, decoding symbolism that can reveal insite within the deeper layers of your psyche. Bring a journal if you’d like to write it down to reflect on it later.

removed.title: Weaving the Relational Web
removed.description: Step into a playful space for real human connection. Expect laughter, curiosity, and just the right amount of emotional moisture to add a little extra magic to your festival.

removed.title: World Tree Within - Alchemy Dance
removed.description: World Tree Within - Alchemy Dance: Join us to dance and breathe into your inner world tree - with breath, movement, energy arts & sound - we dance to heal. Within our central axis ,we can anchor in our pillar of light, Above & Below- harmonizing and centering into Sacred Union within.

added.title: Guided Couple’s Massage
added.description: Join us in the Tantric Tavern for an RMT- guided couples massage. Take turns learning to relax and connect with your partner through touch.

before.title: Sacred Rage Ceremony
before.description: Sacred Rage Ceremony: Access the quiet, rumbling weight of feminine grief/rage through embodied movement and sound. Embrace and allow the natural cycle of decay/death that feeds all life. *This ceremony is open to women (cis & trans), non-binary & gender fluid folks.

before.title: +The Grand Jousting Tourney+
before.description: +The Grand Jousting Tourney+: Hear ye hear ye! The jousts return! We invite you to witness the spectacle of colorfully clashing knights fight atop steeds at high speeds. Come cheer, jeer, quaff a beer, and celebrate the 2nd year!

added.title: The Flair Stitch Project: Crochet Circle
added.description: All skill levels welcome. Learn some basic stitches, make a granny square for our community quilt with our provided materials, or bring your own project and hang out in a chill space.

before.description: The Otherworld Beer Mile: Run a mile and down 4 beers as fast as you can at the Otherworld Beer Mile. Medals awarded to finishers. Limited beer available—participants encouraged to bring their own.

changes.name: The Really Lost Penguins Chill Cave

removed.owner: The Really Lost Penguins Chill Cave
removed.title: Really Lost Hot Chocolate
removed.description: Really Lost Hot Chocolate: Help! We’re lost! But at least we aren’t cold and lost…because we have hot chocolate! If you can find us, we’ll share it with you! Follow your penguiny senses (or your nose) to our little travelling hot chocolate cart and we’ll warm you up too!

removed.owner: The Really Lost Penguins Chill Cave
removed.title: Really Lost Snow Cones
removed.description: Not all penguins who wander are lost…but we are! It’s ok though, we bring snow with us to keep cool. If you find us, we’ll share it with you! Give us an “ark, ark, ark” and we might even moisten it with one of our many home made syrup flavours.
